message:
test: pin net/if.h conformance via differential harness

Adds tests/conformance_diff_net_if.rs covering 4 functions:
- if_nametoindex: "lo" lookup + unknown-iface edge
- if_indextoname: lo index round-trip + huge-index edge
- if_nameindex / if_freenameindex: full enumeration with sorted
  set comparison

6 tests pass, 0 divergences against glibc.

Bead: bd-nif1
